coverage: 100% of reachable node types, including bundled G_Center Geometry and G_Implicit Geometry helpers.
validation: All eight authored, size, seam, height, animated-lid, and split-pin cases match Blender topology exactly. Authored output is 90,928 / 87,165 and split-pin output is 83,154 / 79,693. A full-precision authored-mesh comparison finds five of six bound components bit-exact; max X differs by only 0.0000019073486328125 at the same extreme vertex (31.506650924682617 in Blender versus 31.506649017333984 in GN-VM). String-to-Curves font outlines preserve Blender's positional Bounding Box semantics through nested realization, keeping the centered split-print pin on the build plane. Dense open-shell Exact Booleans retain Blender's collinear panel boundary samples, and concave wall profiles are ear-clipped for a clean Blender-matching silhouette.
